concerns.text: FR-011 requires fuzzy title/author match with Levenshtein ratio >= 0.85 if DOI fails. The plan (Phase 0/1) and research.md only mention 'merge with external retraction databases' and 'exact DOI match' in the data model. There is no explicit task, script, or logic defined to implement the fuzzy matching fallback required by FR-011.

FR-012 mandates a 'stratified permutation test or covariate adjustment for field of study and publication venue'. Phase 3 mentions 'Stratified permutation for confounding variables' but does not explicitly name the stratification keys ('field of study', 'publication venue') nor the specific covariate adjustment method required to satisfy the FR's specificity.

FR-002 requires excluding LLM-inferred edge types. The plan mentions checking metadata flags in 'Risk Mitigation' but does not explicitly map this to a specific data processing step or script (e.g., 'code/data/extract_intern_atlas.py' must filter) to ensure the feature calculation (FR-002) strictly adheres to the exclusion rule.
